data.title: Palladyne AI: Q4 Earnings Insights
data.description: On Thursday, March 5, 2026, Palladyne AI (NASDAQ: PDYN) revealed its Q4 earnings at 06:00 AM. The company surpassed projected earnings by 77.78%, showcasing an EPS of $-0.04 in contrast to the estimated $-0.18. Additionally, revenue saw an increase of $900 thousand from the previous year. In the previous quarter... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Shattuck Labs Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results and Recent Business Highlights
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Shattuck Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: STTK), operating in Austin, Texas and Durham, N.C., released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The pioneering clinical-stage biotech company specializes in creating groundbreaking monoclonal and bispecific DR3 blocking antibodies to aid patients battling inflammatory and immune-mediated illnesses. The report also encompassed recent business achievements made by the Company.

data.title: Reform UK receives £3 million ($4 million) donation from Thai crypto investor Christopher Harborne - reports.
data.description: Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, has received a significant financial injection of £3 million (approximately $4 million) from Christopher Harborne, a crypto investor based in Thailand. This additional funding marks a second major contribution for the party.

data.title: EPAM Enters Into $300 Million Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement
data.description: Today in Newtown, Pennsylvania, EPAM Systems, Inc., a prominent company in digital and AI transformation, revealed its initiation of an accelerated share repurchase agreement with Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC. The agreement entails the repurchase of a total of $300 million worth of shares.

data.title: PPC Group and METLEN Energy & Metals join forces to develop up to 1,500MW of energy storage projects across three countries
data.description: Two energy storage projects are set to be implemented in Romania, Bulgaria, and Italy, with a combined total nominal capacity of 1,500 MW and 3,000 MWh. These projects will utilize two-hour liquid-cooled battery systems that incorporate innovative LFP technology. The collaboration between the two parties involved brings expertise in development, construction, and energy management for the storage systems.

data.title: Lawsuit filed against Coinbase execs demands damages and return of profits following compliance breaches.
data.description: A legal action has been filed to claim damages against Coinbase, aiming for governance changes and the recovery of earnings reportedly gained by individuals within the company amid its compliance shortcomings. The lawsuit is targeting compensation and profits acquired by insiders, with the specific monetary amounts undisclosed at this time.

data.title: Inadev Appoints Manish Agarwal as Chief Executive Officer to Lead Company Into Next Era of Innovation and Growth
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Inadev, a technology company based in Reston, Virginia, unveiled Manish Agarwal as its new CEO. The multinational firm specializes in providing advanced, AI-powered offerings to U.S. federal agencies and worldwide commercial enterprises. This announcement signifies a strategic move in leadership of the company.

data.title: Best Collagen for Women (2026): California Gold Nutrition CollagenUP Named Leading Formula for Skin and Joint Support by Consumer365
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Consumer365 named California Gold Nutrition CollagenUP as a top formula for skin and joint support among women in their 2026 review of the best collagen products. This recognition underscores the increasing popularity of collagen supplementation among women.

data.title: Lilly Employer Connect platform launches with over fifteen independent program administrators offering tailored obesity coverage options to expand access to patients
data.description: Lilly is offering Zepbound® (tirzepatide) KwikPen® for individual use at a fixed price of $449 per dose through their Lilly Employer Connect platform. This pricing is consistent for all available doses of the medication. Employees can also benefit from reduced cost-sharing options. These flexible benefit designs aim to increase access to treatments for obesity while also being in line with other initiatives related to the same cause.

data.title: Pivot Energy and Sustain Our Future Foundation Partner to Invest $400,000 in Communities in Garrett County, MD, Kicking Off Multi-Year Commitment
data.description: Denver-based Pivot Energy has recently revealed a new partnership with the Sustain Our Future Foundation (SOFF) to finance solar projects in the U.S. supported by Microsoft. This collaboration is linked to approximately 500 MWac of solar projects across the country. The agreement is part of a multi-year initiative to invest in renewable energy and benefit local communities.

data.title: Mile Marker Celebrates One Year Launch Anniversary Capped by Impressive Growth, and the Unveiling of New NYC HQ
data.description: In just one year, the independent media agency transitioned from a concept to a proven growth engine, achieving an impressive 40% increase in revenue. This growth was fueled by securing significant AOR contracts with various clients, earning recognition within the industry for its work. Additionally, the agency expanded its presence by establishing a new collaborative hub in Manhattan. The developments took place in New York on March 5, 2026.

data.title: B/CORE Acquires Fuel Consulting to Deepen Mission Reach Across the Intelligence Community
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Reston, Virginia, B/CORE, a national security technology company specializing in converting emerging technology for use by the Intelligence Community (IC) and Department of War (DoW), revealed the acquisition of Fuel Consulting, LLC. The deal marks a significant move for B/CORE as it continues to strengthen its position in the industry.

data.title: Inventory Recovery is Plateauing: Realtor.com® February Monthly Housing Report
data.description: In February, the housing market in Austin, Texas saw a significant shift as the time on market increased by 4 days, totaling nearly two years of declining sales pace. The median list price also decreased by 2.0% year-over-year. This ongoing trend contributed to a 28th consecutive month of inventory growth, indicating a balancing market.

data.title: Hyperscale Data's Subsidiary askROI Deploys Claude Opus 4.6 to Power Next-Generation Artificial Intelligence Reasoning, Agents and Enterprise Intelligence
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Hyperscale Data, Inc. revealed through PRNewswire that its subsidiary askROI, Inc., which is controlled by Hyperscale Data and operates in the artificial intelligence ("AI") sector, has taken a significant step. Hyperscale Data, listed as GPUS on the NYSE American stock exchange, shared this development.
